Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION across all rejected cases
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION after the execution of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time from Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average duration of Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION compared to the duration of Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in variants that share the same preceding activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION and the end of the case

Name: Total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION in variants that later lead to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time until Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION is performed in cases that eventually result in a rejection by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION in variants containing more than one rejection loop
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION versus average time for Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in completed reimbursement cases
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION and the end of the case

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION in cases where the employee resubmits within 7 days
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION in domestic declaration cases (inferred via case:Amount or process pattern)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average waiting time to Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION after submission, specifically in variants that include a subsequent Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION and the next occurrence of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in multi-rejection loops
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION to be done in cases that originate from pre-paid travel cost requests versus standard reimbursement claims
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'
